name: rentalcars / Car rental workflow 388
task: Find a premium 4-door car with automatic transmission and unlimited mileage at Heathrow Airport for pickup, on date April 26, 2 pm, and drop off at the same Airport on April 30, 1 pm, book a range rover if available with full protection.
